
---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve CSM Smart Connect
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior
A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## 📷 Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## 💻 Environment Information
**Device:**
- OS: [e.g. Windows 10, macOS 12.1, Ubuntu 20.04]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 96, Firefox 95, Safari 15.1]
- Screen Resolution: [e.g. 1920x1080, 1366x768]

**Application:**
- Version: [e.g. v1.2.3]
- Environment: [e.g. development, staging, production]
- Deployment: [e.g. Replit, local development]

## 🔧 Technical Details
**Console Errors:**
```
Paste any console errors here
```

**Network Errors:**
```
Paste any network/API errors here
```

**Browser DevTools Info:**
- Any relevant information from browser developer tools

## 📋 Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.

## 🔗 Related Issues
- Link to any related issues or pull requests

## 🏷️ Component/Feature Affected
- [ ] Dashboard
- [ ] Social Media Management
- [ ] Content Calendar
- [ ] Analytics
- [ ] Team Collaboration
- [ ] Content Strategy
- [ ] Asset Library
- [ ] Authentication
- [ ] API Integration
- [ ] Other: _____

## 🚨 Severity
- [ ] Critical (Application crash, data loss)
- [ ] High (Major feature broken)
- [ ] Medium (Feature partially working)
- [ ] Low (Minor UI issue, cosmetic)

## 🔄 Frequency
- [ ] Always
- [ ] Often (50%+ of the time)
- [ ] Sometimes (10-50% of the time)
- [ ] Rarely (< 10% of the time)
- [ ] Once

## 📝 Temporary Workaround
If you found a way to work around this issue, please describe it here.
